name: Ginger Orange Creme Brulee - Scully on Spring
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy bottom sauce pot (preferably stainless steel), bring cream, milk, sugar, vanilla bean, and orange zest to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Whisk egg yolks well. Temper the egg yolks by slowly adding one ladle of the hot cream mixture to the yolks at a time.
4. Add the tempered egg yolk mixture back to the remaining cream mixture and strain.
5. Pour into creme Brulee molds and place in a water bath (baking dish with boiling water) set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake until just set, approximately 30 minutes.
7. Chill several hours before serving.
8. To serve, sprinkle tops of creme Brulee with sugar and brown with either a torch or broiler.
Yield: Makes approximately 5-6 servings (6 ounces each).
